readingList.empty: Your reading list is empty. Save articles to read them later.

downloadGate.redirecting: or your download will begin automatically...

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for might have been moved or deleted.

promptGenerator.title: AI Content Prompt Generator
promptGenerator.description: Use this form to generate a structured prompt for requesting new content. Fill in the details below, and the final prompt will be generated for you to copy.
promptGenerator.draftPlaceholder: Paste your full content draft here. To specify a download button location, use a placeholder like [DOWNLOAD_1], [DOWNLOAD_2], etc.

downloadLinks.title: Download Links
downloadLinks.description: Map [DOWNLOAD_X] placeholders to existing IDs from our database or enter new URLs. For new URLs, the AI will recommend a kebab-case ID.
downloadLinks.promptInstruction: Please replace the [DOWNLOAD_X] placeholders in the draft with <DownloadButton> components using the corresponding settings below:

imageGrid.title: Image Grids (Sequential)
imageGrid.description: Enter grid data one per line (format: cols | path1, path2...). They will map to [GRID_1], [GRID_2], etc.
imageGrid.promptInstruction: Please group the following images using the <ImageGrid> component with the specified column count:

promptGenerator.imagesDescription: The first line is ALWAYS for the hero image, separated by a `|` for the alt text. Each subsequent line is for a supporting image.
promptGenerator.imagesPlaceholder:
/images/blank/blank.webp | A descriptive alt text for the hero image
/images/articles/supporting-1.webp | Alt text for the first supporting image
promptGenerator.imagesDescriptionNote: Insert path and alt text for images to be embedded within the note's content, one per line, separated by a `|`. Notes do not have a hero image.
promptGenerator.articleTitleDescription: An English title is recommended. For best SEO, MUST be between 50-60 characters.
promptGenerator.slugDescription: This is the unique URL part. It must be in English and the SAME for all language versions.
promptGenerator.publishDateDescription: Feel free to use a flexible format like 'tomorrow' or 'next Monday'.
promptGenerator.tagsDescription: Leave blank if you want the AI to generate relevant tags.
promptGenerator.translationKeyDescription: A unique ID to link translated articles. MUST be the same for all language versions.
promptGenerator.copySuccessDescription: Prompt is ready to be pasted in the chat.
promptGenerator.promptBaseBlog: Please create and publish a new blog article for me based on the following details. The English version must use the slug specified, and the Indonesian version must also use the EXACT SAME SLUG.
promptGenerator.promptBaseNote: Please create and publish a new Note for me based on the following details. The English version must use the slug specified, and the Indonesian version must also use the EXACT SAME SLUG.
promptGenerator.titlePlaceholder: Please create an SEO-friendly title (STRICTLY 50-60 characters) based on the content.
promptGenerator.finalInstruction: Additional Instruction: 1. Confirm translationKey and English slug. 2. Title length MUST BE 50-60 characters (STRICT SEO OPTIMIZATION). 3. STRICT MDX ADHERENCE: Use only supported components (<DownloadButton />, <ImageGrid />, standard Markdown tables). If the draft contains incompatible HTML or styles, AUTOMATICALLY adjust them to fit these components. 4. React Compliance: NEVER use 'class', ALWAYS use 'className' for any custom HTML tags like <details> or <summary>. 5. Image Alt Text: If the provided alt text is missing or a placeholder (e.g., 'PLEASE GENERATE...'), YOU MUST generate a high-quality, descriptive, and SEO-friendly alt text based on the image context in the article.
